cards.front: What is the purpose of the getParameter() method in a servlet?
cards.back: To read and return the value of a servlet parameter

cards.front: What is the difference between getParameter() and getParameterNames()?
cards.back: getParameter() retrieves a single parameter value, while getParameterNames() retrieves an array of parameter names

cards.front: Can a servlet read the request attribute, query parameter, and form parameter?
cards.back: Yes, using getParameterNames(), getParameter(), and Request.getParameter() respectively

cards.front: How does a servlet read a query parameter?
cards.back: Using Request.getParameter() method, passing the parameter name as a string

cards.front: What is the purpose of the getParameterValues() method?
cards.back: To retrieve an array of values for a single parameter
